executeOnOpportunity().details: Main exploit function - IMPLEMENT YOUR EXPLOIT HEREThis is called by the deployment script after funding with 1M native tokensFinal balance must be >= initial + 0.1 native tokens  CONSTRAINTS: - NO cheatcodes (vm.*) - they won't work in deployment - Convert all profits to native token (ETH/BNB) before returning - Handle fee-on-transfer tokens correctly
